response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership through open-source projects and workshops
Broad technical stack spanning mobile, web, and systems programming with strong testing focus
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Lacks documented experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning
Mobile platform experience is limited to one iOS app takeover, not ecosystem-wide tooling
